statement.markdown:
## Modal Entrance Animation
A modal window should appear from the top-center of the screen with a smooth slide effect when it's opened. The modal should have an entrance animation, and the background of the page should have a semi-transparent overlay, making it less distracting.
### Requirements
1. Create a modal window that slides in from the top with a smooth animation effect.
2. When the modal is closed, it should slide back up to the top and disappear.
3. The background of the page should have a semi-transparent overlay when the modal is open.
4. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.

gradingCriteria.description: The modal window should slide in with a smooth animation effect.
The background of the page should have a semi-transparent overlay when the modal is open.
The modal should have a title, content, and a close button.
The modal should slide back up to the top and disappear when closed.
